tagline: 30 apps. One Breakverse account. Play games, earn points, build campaigns, and connect your wallet across everything we make.
login_text: One Breakverse account works across all apps — your stats, XP, and leaderboard rank carry everywhere.

apps.name: ConsumerBreak App
apps.desc: Your all-in-one Breakverse hub. Watch live streams, access all 30 Breakery apps, connect your WAX wallet, manage your Breakverse account, and participate in BrandBreak campaigns — all in one place. One account, everything synced.

apps.name: PuzzleBreak
apps.desc: The core puzzle engine powering the Breakverse. Classic puzzle gameplay with community challenges and daily rewards.
